testcase.name: testReleaseSavepointRequiresTransaction

failure.message:
Expecting throwable message: "INVALID_SQL: Invalid SQL: RELEASE SAVEPOINT no_tx, the reason is: Encountered unexpected token: "RELEASE" <S_IDENTIFIER> at line 1, column 1.
Was expecting one of:
"(" "ALTER" "ANALYZE" "BEGIN" "CALL" "COMMENT" "COMMIT" "CREATE" "DECLARE" "DELETE" "DESC" "DESCRIBE" "DROP" "EXEC" "EXECUTE" "EXPLAIN" "GRANT" "IF" "INSERT" "MERGE" "PURGE" "REFRESH" "RENAME" "REPLACE" "RESET" "ROLLBACK" "SAVEPOINT" "SET" "SHOW" "SUMMARIZE" "TABLE" "TRUNCATE" "UPDATE" "UPSERT" "USE" "VALUE" "VALUES" "WITH" <K_SELECT> " to contain: "TRANSACTION_REQUIRED" but did not.
